title: Extract duplicated _isStockRefusal + UA constant to shared modules
description: REFACTOR (from 2026-07-02 complexity audit; ~30min, near-zero risk). Two byte-identical copy-paste clusters: (1) `_isStockRefusal(msg)` regex duplicated in js/shell.js:426 and js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiSettings/MpiSettings.js:33 (comment on the Settings copy literally says "Mirrors _isStockRefusal in shell.js") — retry logic diverging here silently breaks GPU-wait retry. Extract to js/utils/runpodErrorClassify.js, import in both. (2) `const UA = 'Mozilla/5.0...'` defined identically in routes/remoteProxy.js:43, routes/remoteModels.js:35, routes/remoteEngine.js:88, routes/runpodRemote.js:37; `_authHeaders()` also duplicated remoteProxy.js:211 + remoteModels.js:49. Extract to routes/remoteHeaders.js. Pure extraction, no behavior change. Verify: app boots, remote connect works. BRANCH: RunPod.
